caption: The video depicts a formal military gathering, likely taking place in an indoor facility with a large American flag prominently displayed in the background. A significant number of soldiers, dressed in camouflage uniforms, are seated and facing a stage where a group of individuals, including a speaker at a podium, is addressing them. The setting includes two armored vehicles on either side of the stage, adding to the military atmosphere. The text overlay indicates that the content is related to "US sanctions ICC over investigations on war crimes committed in Afghanistan," suggesting that the speech or event is addressing serious geopolitical issues concerning international law and military conduct. The scene conveys a sense of solemnity and official importance, emphasizing the gravity of the topic being discussed.
